products.name: Anker 735 Charger (65W GaN)
products.tagline: Compact multi-port charger for laptop, phone, and tablet
products.what_it_is: A 65W GaN 3-port charger (2x USB-C, 1x USB-A) — replaces a drawer full of chargers with one small brick.
products.best_for: Any grad entering college, a new job, or a first apartment with multiple devices.
products.stands_out: GaN tech keeps it compact without sacrificing wattage; works for MacBooks and most USB-C laptops.
products.before_you_buy: Check if they have a USB-C laptop — older laptops may use proprietary charging ports.
products.skip_if: They're already well-stocked with charging gear or don't use a USB-C laptop.

products.name: Moleskine Classic Hardcover Notebook, Large, Ruled
products.tagline: Durable notebook for note-taking, journaling, or planning
products.what_it_is: A 240-page ruled hardcover notebook — the go-to for professionals and students who prefer writing by hand.
products.best_for: Grads entering roles where note-taking matters, or anyone who journals.
products.stands_out: Lasts for years; the quality gap between Moleskine and cheaper notebooks is noticeable after daily use.
products.before_you_buy: It's a pen-and-paper gift — skip it if they're purely digital.
products.skip_if: They already have a stash of notebooks or prefer digital tools.

products.name: Samsonite Freeform Hardside Carry-On 21"
products.tagline: Lightweight hardside carry-on for first solo trips
products.what_it_is: A hard-shell spinner suitcase sized for airline overhead bins with spinner wheels and TSA lock.
products.best_for: College grads entering jobs that involve travel, or any grad who takes trips regularly.
products.stands_out: Hard-side luggage protects contents better and is easier to clean; a good piece lasts 5–10 years.
products.before_you_buy: Confirm size limits for their most-used airline — some budget carriers have stricter carry-on rules.
products.skip_if: They already have decent luggage or won't travel much in the near term.
